privacy: Appointment catalog only. No patients, user accounts, appointment history, billing, audit logs, staff emails, staff phones, user IDs, or license numbers included.

facility.name: MedSphere Demo Clinic
facility.description: Departments, service catalogs, staff workflows, patient portals, records, diagnostics, billing, and AI support in one connected system.

departments.name: Primary Care
departments.description: Family medicine, triage, and follow-up care

departments.name: Cardiology
departments.description: Preventive cardiology, ECG review, and chronic heart-care follow-up

departments.name: Pediatrics
departments.description: Child wellness, vaccinations, and pediatric acute visits

departments.name: Emergency & Triage
departments.description: Walk-in urgent assessment and fast-track clinical triage

departments.name: Billing & Administration
departments.description: Clinic administration, insurance support, and billing desk

departments.name: Neurology
departments.description: Headache, seizure, neuropathy, and neurologic follow-up care

departments.name: Dermatology
departments.description: Skin checks, acne, rashes, and minor dermatologic procedures

departments.name: Orthopedics
departments.description: Joint pain, fractures, sports medicine, and musculoskeletal care

departments.name: Women's Health
departments.description: Gynecology, prenatal counseling, and preventive women's health visits

departments.name: Mental Health
departments.description: Counseling, psychiatry follow-up, and behavioral-health support

departments.name: Dental Care
departments.description: Preventive dentistry, dental pain visits, and oral-health care plans

departments.name: Ophthalmology
departments.description: Eye exams, retinal screening, and vision-care referrals

departments.name: Endocrinology
departments.description: Diabetes, thyroid, and metabolic condition management

departments.name: Rehabilitation & Physical Therapy
departments.description: Physical therapy, post-injury rehabilitation, and mobility plans

departments.name: Oncology
departments.description: Cancer screening coordination, survivorship follow-up, and referral care

doctors.bio: Dr. Aleksei Petrov reviews imaging studies, ultrasound findings, and radiology coordination cases.
Dr. Amara Okafor provides chest-pain review, cardiac-risk counseling, and post-ECG follow-up.
Dr. Amina El-Sayed treats migraine, neuropathy, and seizure follow-up with a calm, patient-centered approach.
Dr. Ana Ribeiro focuses on retina review, diabetic screening, and visual-symptom triage.
Dr. Anika Rao is a board-certified family physician for the MedSphere demo clinic.
Dr. Camila Torres offers therapy visits, anxiety support, and continuity counseling.
Dr. Elena Popescu supports prenatal counseling, preventive screening, and women's health follow-up.
Dr. Fatima Zahra supports cancer screening coordination, survivorship review, and referral care.
Dr. Hiro Yamamoto supports lesion review, biopsy planning, and outpatient dermatologic procedures.
Dr. Ibrahim Hassan handles comprehensive eye exams, glaucoma checks, and diabetic eye screening.
Dr. James O'Connor manages oncology follow-up, symptom review, and coordinated care plans.
Dr. Kenji Watanabe manages urgent walk-ins, acute stabilization, and triage escalation.
Dr. Lars Nordin focuses on neurophysiology, dizziness, and complex neurologic symptom review.
Dr. Layla Haddad focuses on pediatric dental visits, prevention, and gentle urgent dental care.
Dr. Leila Farah provides family medicine, preventive care, and chronic-condition follow-up.
Dr. Mariam Al-Khatib provides preventive gynecology, prenatal counseling, and reproductive-health visits.
Dr. Mateo Silva supports child wellness, pediatric acute visits, and vaccine counseling.
Dr. Mateusz Kowalski manages sports injuries, fracture follow-up, and joint-pain care.
Dr. Maya Singh supports diabetes care, thyroid review, and metabolic-health treatment planning.
Dr. Nia Mensah provides preventive skin checks, acne care, eczema review, and minor skin procedures.
Dr. Noah Stein focuses on diabetes follow-up, medication adjustment, and prevention counseling.
Dr. Ravi Menon provides psychiatry follow-up, medication review, and behavioral-health care planning.
Dr. Santiago Alvarez provides preventive dentistry, dental-pain care, and oral-health counseling.
Dr. Sara Lindgren supports X-ray review, ultrasound reporting, and diagnostic imaging workflows.
Dr. Sofia Kovalenko provides pediatric wellness, immunization planning, and acute child visits.
Dr. Valentina Rossi focuses on sports medicine, mobility recovery, and active-lifestyle injuries.
Dr. Youssef Benali focuses on preventive cardiology, chest-pain follow-up, and ECG interpretation.
Dr. Zara Khan coordinates rehabilitation plans, mobility recovery, and post-injury care.
Jonas Bergstrom leads physical therapy follow-ups, strengthening plans, and mobility coaching.
